blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,073 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.7" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
